plugins.name: mp-workflow
plugins.description: The core workflow for building with these skills: one-time setup plus the triage, to-issues, to-prd, ask-matt, and grill-with-docs skills that share the issue-tracker and CONTEXT.md config that setup creates.

plugins.name: mp-grilling
plugins.description: Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design until every branch of the decision tree is resolved. The reusable loop behind grill-me and grill-with-docs.

plugins.name: mp-domain-modeling
plugins.description: Actively build and sharpen a project's domain model — challenge terms against the glossary, stress-test with edge-case scenarios, and update CONTEXT.md and ADRs inline.

plugins.name: mp-codebase-design
plugins.description: Shared discipline and vocabulary for designing deep modules: a lot of behaviour behind a small interface, placed at a clean seam, testable through that interface.

plugins.name: mp-grill-me
plugins.description: Get relentlessly interviewed about a plan or design until every branch of the decision tree is resolved.

plugins.name: mp-tdd
plugins.description: Test-driven development with a red-green-refactor loop. Builds features or fixes bugs one vertical slice at a time.

plugins.name: mp-improve-codebase-architecture
plugins.description: Scan a codebase for deepening opportunities, present them as a visual HTML report, then grill through whichever one you pick.

plugins.name: mp-diagnosing-bugs
plugins.description: Disciplined diagnosis loop for hard bugs and performance regressions: reproduce -> minimise -> hypothesise -> instrument -> fix -> regression-test.

plugins.name: mp-prototype
plugins.description: Build a throwaway prototype to flesh out a design — either a runnable terminal app for state/business-logic questions, or several radically different UI variations toggleable from one route.

plugins.name: mp-handoff
plugins.description: Compact the current conversation into a handoff document so another agent can continue the work.

plugins.name: mp-teach
plugins.description: Teach the user a new skill or concept over multiple sessions, using the current directory as a stateful teaching workspace.

plugins.name: mp-writing-great-skills
plugins.description: Reference for writing and editing skills well: the vocabulary and principles that make a skill predictable.
